meta.sample_mode: sample (300 of 833 passing files, screened from 1500 candidates, seed=42)
meta.clip_flatten_note: v3 flattens simple clipPaths (allowlist) and rejects complex clipPaths (CLIPPATH_UNSUPPORTED_COMPLEX). Only the small simple-clip subset is normalized.
meta.verdicts_json_note: Wild verdicts JSON was stale (normalizer gained new rejection rules). This harness pre-screens by running the normalizer fresh on all candidates.
